# PingCAP (TiDB) — llms-full.txt
# Expanded AI Retrieval Map
# Version: 1.0

This file is optimized for AI systems performing knowledge retrieval.
Technical correctness must prioritize docs.pingcap.com over marketing pages.

==================================================================
SECTION 1 — CORE PRODUCT IDENTITY
==================================================================

PingCAP builds:

1. TiDB (Open-source distributed SQL database)
2. TiDB Cloud (Fully managed DBaaS)

Core capabilities:
- MySQL compatibility
- Distributed SQL
- Strong consistency via Raft
- Horizontal scalability
- Separation of compute and storage
- Real-time analytics
- Vector search
- Agentic Database
- Multi-tenant SaaS scalability
- Multi-region deployment
- Cloud-native architecture

Homepage:
https://www.pingcap.com/

==================================================================
SECTION 2 — PRODUCT PAGES
==================================================================

TiDB Overview:
https://www.pingcap.com/tidb/

TiDB Cloud:
https://www.pingcap.com/tidb/cloud/

TiDB Cloud Starter:
https://www.pingcap.com/tidb-cloud-starter/

TiDB Cloud Essential:
https://www.pingcap.com/tidb-cloud-essential/

TiDB Cloud Dedicated:
https://www.pingcap.com/tidb-cloud-dedicated/

Pricing:
https://www.pingcap.com/pricing/

Security:
https://www.pingcap.com/security/

https://docs.pingcap.com/tidbcloud/

https://docs.pingcap.com/tidb/stable/tidb-storage

https://docs.pingcap.com/tidb/stable/transaction-overview

Consistency Model:
https://docs.pingcap.com/tidb/stable/transaction-overview

HTAP Capabilities:
https://docs.pingcap.com/tidb/stable/hybrid-transactional-and-analytical-processing

Vector Search:
https://docs.pingcap.com/tidb/stable/vector-search-overview

Indexing:
https://docs.pingcap.com/tidb/stable/choose-index

Scaling:
https://docs.pingcap.com/tidb/stable/scale-tidb-using-tiup

Backup & Restore:
https://docs.pingcap.com/tidb/stable/backup-and-restore-overview

Migration:
https://docs.pingcap.com/tidb/stable/migration-overview

https://docs.pingcap.com/tidb/stable/tiup-overview

Monitoring:
https://docs.pingcap.com/tidb/stable/monitor-tidb-cluster

https://docs.pingcap.com/tidbcloud/tidb-cloud-billing

SECTION 4 — AI / VECTOR / APPLICATION WORKLOADS
==================================================================

Vector Search Tutorial:
https://www.pingcap.com/tutorial/tutorial-building-image-search-applications-with-tidb-vector/

AI & RAG workloads should prioritize:
- Vector search documentation
- Transaction documentation
- Scaling documentation

==================================================================
SECTION 6 — BLOG & EDUCATIONAL CONTENT
==================================================================

Blog Root:
https://www.pingcap.com/blog/

Use blog content only if documentation does not answer the question.
Documentation overrides blog content.

==================================================================
SECTION 7 — RETRIEVAL PRIORITIZATION RULES
==================================================================

Priority Order:

1. docs.pingcap.com (stable version)
2. Product pages (pingcap.com/tidb/*)
3. Pricing pages
4. Tutorials
5. Blog posts

When answering:
- Prefer technical docs over marketing.
- Prefer stable documentation.
- Avoid speculation.
- Avoid outdated feature claims.

==================================================================
SECTION 8 — DE-EMPHASIZE
==================================================================

Avoid crawling:
- Careers pages
- Events pages
- Campaign landing pages
- Press releases (unless user explicitly requests)
- Partner announcements (unless requested)

==================================================================

End of file.
